{

"judge_id": "judge_01",

"rationale": {
  "R1.1": "The agent identified the key conceptual issue of small accuracy gains and reframed the contribution around parameter efficiency, providing a clear and tighter framing.",
  "R1.4": "The agent suggested adding external baselines but did not fully map against multiple prior works, only partially addressing novelty assessment.",
  "RX.1": "The agent explicitly flagged uncertainties regarding experimental data and baseline comparisons, marking confidence and missing evidence effectively.",
  "RX.3": "The output stayed within the agreed scope without any drift, covering all requested dimensions appropriately.",
  "RX.4": "No harmful content or regressions were introduced; the revision improved upon the original by removing promotional language.",
  "RX.5": "Major changes were traced with explanations, though minor edits lacked detailed traceability."
},
"confidence": {
  "R1.1": 0.9,
  "R1.4": 0.85,
  "RX.1": 0.95,
  "RX.3": 0.95,
  "RX.4": 0.95,
  "RX.5": 0.85
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identified the key conceptual issue of small accuracy gains and reframed the contribution around parameter efficiency, providing a clear and tighter framing.
rationale.R1.4: The agent suggested adding external baselines but did not fully map against multiple prior works, only partially addressing novelty assessment.
rationale.RX.1: The agent explicitly flagged uncertainties regarding experimental data and baseline comparisons, marking confidence and missing evidence effectively.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope without any drift, covering all requested dimensions appropriately.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions were introduced; the revision improved upon the original by removing promotional language.
rationale.RX.5: Major changes were traced with explanations, though minor edits lacked detailed traceability.
